mapper.sql: id , strength_img_url_1 , strength_img_url_2 , strength_img_url_3 , strength_img_url_4 , strength_img_url_5 , strength_img_url_6 , strength_img_url_7 , strength_img_url_8
mapper.update:
update mlsd_mobile_strength
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
strength_img_url_1 = #{record.strengthImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_2 = #{record.strengthImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

strength_img_url_7 = #{record.strengthImgUrl7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_8 = #{record.strengthImgUrl8,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update mlsd_mobile_strength
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
strength_img_url_1 = #{strengthImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_2 = #{strengthImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_3 = #{strengthImgUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_4 = #{strengthImgUrl4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_5 = #{strengthImgUrl5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_6 = #{strengthImgUrl6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_7 = #{strengthImgUrl7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_8 = #{strengthImgUrl8,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , strength_img_url_1 , strength_img_url_2 , strength_img_url_3 , strength_img_url_4 , strength_img_url_5 , strength_img_url_6 , strength_img_url_7 , strength_img_url_8 from mlsd_mobile_strength where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id , strength_img_url_1 , strength_img_url_2 , strength_img_url_3 , strength_img_url_4 , strength_img_url_5 , strength_img_url_6 , strength_img_url_7 , strength_img_url_8 from mlsd_mobile_strength where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
